    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    R

    RecurveBow - Class in nongui.listofcards.itemcard.ChangeClass
    Represents the "Recurve Bow" Item Card.
    RecurveBow() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.ChangeClass.RecurveBow
    Constructs a new Recurve Bow with its identity, effect text, and target class.
    RedBrambleback - Class in nongui.listofobjective
    Represents the "Red Brambleback" Objective Card.
    RedBrambleback() - Constructor for class nongui.listofobjective.RedBrambleback
    Constructs a new Red Brambleback objective with its requirements and penalties.
    refillActionPoint() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    refresh() - Static method in class gui.BoardView
    Rebuilds the entire game board UI based on the current state in GameEngine.
    removeCardFromHand(BaseCard) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    removeHeroCard(int) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    resolveChallenge(int, Player, BaseCard) - Static method in class nongui.gameutils.ChallengeUtils
    Resolves a challenge attempt when a player plays a card.
    reStartGame() - Static method in class gui.BoardView
    Resets the game state and UI.
    reStartGame() - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
    Initializes and restarts the game.
    RiftHerald - Class in nongui.listofobjective
    Represents the "Rift Herald" Objective Card.
    RiftHerald() - Constructor for class nongui.listofobjective.RiftHerald
    Constructs a new Rift Herald objective with its requirements and penalties.
    RIGHT_BG - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    RightHeroesBox - Class in gui.board.field
    Represents the hero field for the right player.
    RightHeroesBox(Player) - Constructor for class gui.board.field.RightHeroesBox
    Constructs the hero field box for the given right player.
    RightPlayerArea - Class in gui.board
    Represents the right area of the game board for a specific player.
    RightPlayerArea(Player) - Constructor for class gui.board.RightPlayerArea
    Constructs the RightPlayerArea for the given player.
    rollForAbility(HeroCard, int) - Static method in class nongui.gameutils.DiceUtils
    Executes a 2d6 roll for activating a Hero's ability.
    rollForChallenge(Player) - Static method in class nongui.gameutils.DiceUtils
    Executes a 2d6 roll specifically for a Challenge attempt.
    rotateObjective(int) - Static method in class nongui.gameutils.GameplayUtils
    Replaces an objective card at a specific slot on the board with a new one from the deck.
    Ryze - Class in nongui.listofleader
    Represents "Ryze" Leader Card.
    Ryze() - Constructor for class nongui.listofleader.Ryze
    Constructs a new Ryze Leader Card with Mage class and magic-draw synergy.
